findings.message: Magic number '34'. Consider extracting it to a named constant.
Magic number '21'. Consider extracting it to a named constant.
Magic number '34'. Consider extracting it to a named constant.
String `welcome_message` uses a single `%s` format specifier. Consider using string concatenation instead of `String.format`.
No activity with a VIEW intent filter and http/https data scheme found. Add deep link support to enable Google App Indexing. https://developer.android.com/training/app-indexing

Permissions imply hardware features that are not declared as optional: `android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION` -> `android.hardware.location.gps`, `android.permission.CAMERA` -> `android.hardware.camera`. Declare each with `<uses-feature android:name="…" android:required="false" />` to allow installation on devices without this hardware.
`android:allowBackup="true"` allows app data to be backed up via adb. Set to false if your app handles sensitive data. http://developer.android.com/reference/android/R.attr.html#allowBackup
`android:debuggable="true"` is set in the manifest. This should be controlled by the build system (debug vs release build type). Remove the debuggable attribute from the manifest.

Missing `android:networkSecurityConfig` on <application> with targetSdkVersion >= 28. Add a Network Security Configuration to explicitly control network security behavior. https://developer.android.com/training/articles/security-config
Missing `android:supportsRtl="true"` on <application>. Add RTL support to ensure proper layout mirroring for RTL languages.
Exported receiver `.receivers.BootReceiver` does not require a permission. Add android:permission to restrict access.

Receiver `.receivers.BootReceiver` listens for protected broadcast `android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED` and is exported without a permission. Add android:permission to prevent unauthorized broadcasts.
Exported provider `.providers.DataProvider` does not require a permission. Add android:permission to restrict access.
Toast.makeText() called without .show(). The toast will not be displayed.
